headline: Linde to Build New Air Separation Plant in North Carolina
summary: HOUSTON, April 02, 2026--Linde announced today that it will build, own and operate a new facility for the supply of industrial gases in Garysburg, North Carolina.

headline: Helium Disruption Spells Opportunity for Some Suppliers of the Gas
summary: The effects will depend on where companies source their helium and how big their exposure is to the gas.
